name: 小红书爆款笔记生成 agent Skill
description: 研究公开热门内容、生成原创笔记、估算账号健康并执行经批准的发布流程。搜索质量自适应：同 query 质量记忆驱动扩词/重试/多源；低质量样本时自动注入边界约束，高质量时放宽缓存与扩词。

features: provider priority exploration on poor quality

skills.name: research-hot-notes
skills.description: [研究/选题] Executes search_hot_notes. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: research-trends
skills.description: [研究/选题] Executes search_trending_topics. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: analyze-hot-notes
skills.description: [研究/选题] Executes analyze_hot_notes. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: generate-note
skills.description: [生成/改写] Executes generate_xhs_note. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: account-analysis
skills.description: [账号/登录] Executes query_account_weight. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: authorized-publishing
skills.description: [发布流] Executes create_publish_draft. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-controls
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes get_enterprise_controls. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-budget
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes get_enterprise_budget. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-approval-create
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes create_enterprise_approval. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-approval-decide
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes decide_enterprise_approval. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-audit-verify
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes verify_enterprise_audit. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.

skills.name: enterprise-dlp
skills.description: [企业管控] Executes enterprise_dlp_scan. Read ux.status → ux.summary → ux.next_step.
